subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. C, Emogene Hoagg et al, spoken on 1920-10-24+25
subcodes.first_line: This is the Lord's supper. Sometimes the material things have a spiritual effect - for instance, music is material but has an effect over the spirit
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
